- `src/index.rs`
- `src/parser/c_lang.rs`

input.command: grep -rn "parse_file\s*(" --include="*" . | grep -v "fn parse_file\s*(" | grep -v "^\s*//" | grep -v "^\s*\*" | grep -v "#.*parse_file" | sed 's|^\./||' | cut -d: -f1 | sort -u
find . -type f -name "*.rs" | head -20 && find . -type f -name "*.py" | head -20

find . -type f \( -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.go" \) | grep -v "/target/" | grep -v "/__pycache__/" | xargs grep -l "parse_file" 2>/dev/null | sed 's|^\./||' | sort

for f in src/index.rs src/parser/c_lang.rs src/parser/cpp.rs src/parser/csharp.rs src/parser/go.rs src/parser/java.rs src/parser/javascript.rs src/parser/python.rs src/parser/ruby.rs src/parser/rust_lang.rs src/parser/treesitter.rs src/parser/typescript.rs src/query/duckdb_backend.rs src/query/index.rs; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  grep -n "parse_file" "$f"
done
